svg.title: Battery Analyzer Use Case Diagram
svg.desc: Use case diagram showing User and System actors with all major use cases of Battery Analyzer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What actions can the user take in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('What does the backend API do in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('How does real-time battery monitoring work in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('How does Battery Analyzer estimate battery health?')
sendPrompt('How does the session history work in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('How does Battery Analyzer show per-app battery usage?')
sendPrompt('What battery optimisation shortcuts does the app provide?')
sendPrompt('How does Battery Analyzer get AI predictions from the backend?')
sendPrompt('How does anomaly detection work in Battery Analyzer?')
sendPrompt('What does the logs tab show in Battery Analyzer?')
